name: @block-agent/app-agent_identity
description: agent_identity BlockApp: pins the agent's identity + operating constraints at the head of the stable cache prefix; user-only `set` (anti-jailbreak).
$exports_note: Mirrors @block-agent/core / app-memory_letta: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build step). Importers use '@block-agent/app-agent_identity/manifest.js'; NodeNext resolves it to ./src/manifest.ts via the workspace symlink. tsx runs the same source directly.

blockAgent.summary: agent 的身份与操作约束；user-only set，agent 改不了自己（防越狱）。
